privileged_info_summary: The HIST201 course (World History) is created by setup_moodle.sh with this exact shortname and fullname. Three student users are pre-created and enrolled in the course: bbrown (Bob Brown), cgarcia (Carlos Garcia), and dlee (Diana Lee). The task requires creating two groups named 'Discussion Group A' and 'Discussion Group B' with specified member assignments, and setting the course group mode to 'Separate groups' (groupmode=1). All data is synthetic, generated by environment initialization scripts. No external data sources are involved.
